ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's primary position */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of NBA championships won by the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 84-85, 85-86) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "finals_start" TEXT /* Start date of the finals */,
  "finals_end" TEXT /* End date of the finals */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Total years of coaching experience */,
  "college_coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of college coaching experience */,
  "nba_coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of NBA coaching experience */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won as a coach */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total career wins as a coach */,
  "career_losses" INTEGER /* Total career losses as a coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-coach relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's tenure */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins during the coach's tenure */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses during the coach's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed entity (e.g., player_id, team_id) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the accessed entity (e.g., player, team) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "expected_recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  "actual_recovery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of recovery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "rehab_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of rehabilitation in days */,
  "rehab_program" TEXT /* Description of the rehabilitation program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
